creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Delete both net-p2p/freenet and net-p2p/libfreenet from the port tree.  Lioux
long ago dropped maintainership and the the Freenet development team has
dropped all support for Freenet 0.5 (this port) and has moved to make the 0.5
network unusable to force 0.7 migration.  

Freenet 0.7 is incompatbile with 0.5 and doesn't have stable releases yet
(hence unable to make a port for it).  At some point in the future when it
settles down I will work this.

Fix: 

Delete both ports
How-To-Repeat: N/A
